arts.ttl: Inter Milan XI vs Feyenoord – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Inter Milan make the trip to Rotterdam to take on Feyenoord in the Champions League’s last 16 this evening. Simeone Inzaghi’s side impressed in the league phase to finish fourth. Across their eight games, the Italian champions conceded just one goal to post the Champions League’s best defensive record. Inter are also going strong domestically. […] The post Inter Milan XI vs Feyenoord – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord vs Inter: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Feyenoord are aiming to upset another Milan club in this season's Champions League, with the Dutch side taking on Inter in the round of 16. Van Persie inherited a decimated squad, and Feyenoord's availability woes have refused to ease in time for Wednesday's first leg against the Nerazzurri.
